approvalSource: Steve approved unattended Foundation-only continuation; SOURCE-012 runs before SOURCE-018 and extraction so source contracts and connectors are separated as live layers.
scopeSummary: Expose source contracts, connector reach, trust, freshness/drift, owners, direct links, and dependent systems as separate live layers from /api/source-of-truth and Data Sources. No extraction or external writes.
constraints: Foundation-only; do not start Value Builder split.
Use existing live sprint unless proof closeout explicitly updates Current Sprint truth.
Do not run extraction from SOURCE-012.
Do not mutate source data, Drive permissions, credentials, provider config, or external systems.
Do not treat connector access as source trust.
Approval-bound actions park the action, not the whole sprint; continue safe approved sprint work.
Each card must close with focused proof, System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, process:foundation-ship, and clean pushed main.
